kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan who makes Saddles' levy is higher than both the Weaver and the artisan in Kingsford.
14 coins goes with at most one of Rowan, Mason, Loom, Saddles, and Highrow.
Rowan goes with neither Kingsford nor 18 coins.
Mallet goes with at least one of Cooper or Highrow.
Exactly two of (the members of the Joiners' Guild, Matilda, and the artisan with the Loom) belong to the Hill Ward.
Awl goes with exactly three of Edmund, Weaver, Saddles, Kingsford, and 12 coins.
Kingsford goes with 14 coins if and only if Loom does not go with Matilda.
Edmund, Potter, Loom, and Rope belong to different artisans.
Either Potter goes with Rope, or Tapestries goes with 16 coins — but not both.
Between Cooper and Weaver, one goes with Eastcheap and the other with Highrow.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: The angler fishing with Nightcrawler's weight is higher than both the angler who landed the Trout and the angler at Pinehollow.
13 lb goes with at most one of Wade, Catfish, Spoon, Nightcrawler, and Grayreach.
Wade goes with neither Pinehollow nor 15 lb.
Swimbait goes with at least one of Bass or Grayreach.
Exactly two of (the members of the Sunfish Family, Mabel, and the angler using the Spoon) belong to the South Watershed.
Popper goes with exactly three of Esther, Trout, Nightcrawler, Pinehollow, and 12 lb.
Pinehollow goes with 13 lb if and only if Spoon does not go with Mabel.
Esther, Pike, Spoon, and Dough belong to different catches.
Either Pike goes with Dough, or Shrimp goes with 14 lb — but not both.
Between Bass and Trout, one goes with Foxglen and the other with Grayreach.
